title: Top 10 Restaurants in Chiang Rai — Real Reviews & Ratings
meta_description: The 10 best restaurants in Chiang Rai, Thailand with real ratings and guest reviews from tripadvisor. Updated 2026-03-08.
intro: Discover the best restaurants in Chiang Rai, Thailand. These recommendations are based on real guest reviews and ratings from tripadvisor.

items.name: Chivit Thamma Da Coffee House, Bistro & Bar
items.description: Chivit Thamma Da Coffee House, Bistro & Bar is a 4.7-rated Cafe, European restaurant in Chiang Rai. Known for cheesecake, cakes, full of flavour and well cooked.
highlights: full of flavour and well cooked
